C_D_NeutralContact_NoFail.comment: Boolean parameter who store the driver door switch failure state

C_D_NeutralContactAlwaysPrsnt.comment: Boolean parameter use to know the monitoring state of the driver door switch

C_D_NeutralContactNeverPresent.comment: Boolean parameter who store the driver door switch failure state

C_TM_VeryLowSpeedDeactivation.comment: Calibration parameter who store the maximum number of missions without drive

C1d_K_ExpStep.10.comment: I_DR_DOOR_SW_D and I_DR_DOOR_SW_B are connected on the same input of microcontroler. only I_DR_DOOR_SW_D is considered in ARXML

C1d_K_ExpStep.11.comment: I_AS_DOOR_SW_D and I_AS_DOOR_SW_B are connected on the same input of microcontroler. only I_AS_DOOR_SW_D is considered in ARXML

C1d_TM_StepExpo.1.comment: PWM capability respecting 100Hz as per RQT_DOORLOCK_ADDON_BCM_14

CancelCounter.comment: Linked to FOTA system. See Reset cancel counter and FOTA process for TECU

lists.101: signal has too few transitions events
lists.151: Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
lists.131: value of signal protection calculation incorrect
lists.130: alive  sequence counter incorrect  not updated
lists.102: signal has too many transitions  events
lists.21: circuit short to battery or open
lists.20: circuit short to ground or open
lists.0: Device and failure type ODB codding Gen Failure Info
lists.38: signal rate of change below threshold
lists.39: signal rate of change above threshold
lists.40: signal bias level outofrange 0 adjust failure

E_R_coef_W_1.comment: The driver door switch is not monitored by default

E_R_coef_W_2.comment: The ECU Shall reset to 0, the counter of missions for driver door switch failure detection, if driver door closing is detected.

E_R_coef_W_3.comment: The ECU shall set the driver door failure state CAN signal to Driver door information Ok when the counter becomes lower than the maximum number of missions to detect driver door switc

E_R_coef_W_4.comment: After a reset the ECU shall set the driver door switch failure state to failure detected when the counter reaches the maximum number of missions to detect driver door switch failure.

E_S_DefaultVehicleSpeed_high.comment:
Request PWM control for DAY/NIGHT activation.
(200HZ)

E_S_veh_limit_max.comment:
to be checked if needed for R and N
Request PWM control for DAY/NIGHT activation.
(200HZ)

E_S_veh_limit_min.comment: to be checked if needed for R and N

E1d_LowBeam_Law_Y.0.comment: signal equals to 1 when there is an invalid clock or CRC on vehicle speed

V-SSD_1.35.comment: calibration for memorizing a stop request with speed
